expected_output: Python is a high-level programming language used for web development, AI, automation, and more.
A REST API is an architectural style that enables communication between systems over HTTP using methods such as GET, POST, PUT, and DELETE.
Docker is a platform that packages applications and their dependencies into lightweight, portable containers.
Git is a distributed version control system used to track changes in source code and collaborate with other developers.
PostgreSQL is an open-source relational database management system known for reliability, SQL compliance, and advanced features.
